task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for High-Rise Apartment in San Diego CA (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $1150000.00 and wholesale is $920000.00. Product features: 2-bedroom luxury apartment with ocean views and resort-style amenities. Reference: https://www.compass.com/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for High-Rise Apartment in San Diego CA. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying High-Rise Apartment in San Diego CA. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
